personalInfo.name: Maheshkumar S
personalInfo.about: Software Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience developing web, mobile, and desktop applications using Angular, React.js, Flutter, Python, Django, Ionic, and Electron.js. Experienced in building RESTful APIs, working with PostgreSQL, integrating HL7 standards, and developing responsive user interfaces with Tailwind CSS. Passionate about solving real-world problems by transforming ideas into scalable digital solutions.

experiences.description: Developed modules for Medical Billing, Claims Management, Payment Processing, and Provider Management. Designed and integrated secure RESTful APIs using Django REST Framework to support healthcare data exchange and business workflows.

Developed POS and Kitchen Order Ticket (KOT) applications using Angular, Ionic, and Electron.js. Built Betting Management modules and dashboards with Angular. Developed Import and Export Shipment Tracking applications. Contributed to Medical Billing and Healthcare Automation solutions using React.js, Flutter, Python, Django, and PostgreSQL.

projects.title: Medical Billing & Healthcare Automation
projects.description: Developed a healthcare management platform featuring patient management, appointment scheduling, billing, claims processing, payment management, HL7 integration, and RESTful APIs using Django.

projects.title: Offline POS System
projects.description: Developed an offline Point of Sale (POS) application with billing, Kitchen Order Ticket (KOT) management, offline sales synchronization, and local file-based data storage using Electron.js.

projects.title: Shipment Tracking System
projects.description: Developed web and mobile applications for import and export shipment tracking with real-time logistics monitoring.

projects.title: Betting Platform
projects.description: Developed an Angular-based dashboard with authentication, authorization, user management, and REST API integration.

projects.title: Resume Builder App
projects.description: Developed a Flutter application that enables users to create, edit, preview, and export professional resumes using customizable templates.
